svg.text: Debugging at the office. Same desk, different bugs.
Debugging in Hyrule — bugs are just Bokoblins.
Behind the walls. The real titan is legacy code.
Courtside debugging. I ally-oop features, teammates dunk.
At the boss pit. Pushing code like pushing lanes.
On the Sunny. My code is the One Piece.
Blue butterflies, a blue moon, and bugs that just won't beach off.
